text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mejiro Dober is frantically trying to pull
herself out of her rut, Air Groove happens by and
asks to talk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During her conversation with Air Groove, Mejiro
Dober admits she's afraid of breaking her promise
to Mejiro Bright and of betraying people's
expectations of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Air Groove points out that those fears are
really a reflection of her progress. After all, those
expectant fans wouldn't be there if she wasn't
working so hard to keep her promise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While her fears and tremors still linger after that
talk, Mejiro Dober decides to run in the Japanese
Oaks for all the people that support her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she declares her plan, I can see a bright light
shining in her eyes, and that makes me confident
that Mejiro Dober will get through this.
